events.label: reasoning
events.text:
We need produce JSON answer matching schema. Scenario: field review of Locates & marking shows expected unit in intended location, nameplates/orientation marks readable, housing and adjacent work no damage, item matches referenced detail for rough-complete stage. Reference 811/CGA best practices. Need identify component/material/condition involved. Since locates & marking: likely a utility locate marker, locate station, marker post, or buried utility warning tape/marker? We need decision pass/fail/needs_more_info. Condition: none flagged, matches detail, readable, no damage. Decision pass. Risk low. Work_stage rough-complete. component_conditions empty. percent_complete maybe 100? Rough-complete stage maybe 85%? Value not needed 0. confidence high ~0.95. Findings none. Actions none. Rationale. References 811/CGA best practices, perhaps CGA Best Practices 5.0 etc. Need include all fields. Since no audio, sound_source blank? Schema string. Could use empty string or "N/A". event_time 0, rate 0, order empty, workable empty.

Need output raw JSON. Ensure not prose.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "pass",
  "risk": "low",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": [],
  "percent_complete": 95,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Locate/marking unit present in correct location per engineered detail",
    "Nameplates and orientation marks are legible",
    "No visible damage to housing or adjacent work"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Proceed to close-out/inspection documentation"
  ],
  "rationale": "The locate and marking component is installed as designed, identifiable, undamaged, and consistent with the rough-complete detail and 811/CGA best practices, so it is acceptable at this stage.",
  "references": [
    "811/CGA best practices for utility locate and marking"
  ]
}
